model_lessons: Actionable K edges went 4-1, with the only miss already classified as wait/live better rather than full pregame fire.
Anti-burn fades went 3-1. The only miss was Cristopher Sanchez ceiling eruption to 13 Ks.
Low-line overs and leash-supported 5+ markets performed best.
Ceiling-priced 7.5+ markets remain dangerous; fade logic worked on deGrom, Gilbert, and Wrobleski but missed Sanchez.
Sample-size trap handling was crucial on Trevor McDonald and should become permanent logic.
Command volatility must be separated from K ceiling after Soriano hit 6 Ks despite 6 BB and 6 ER.
patch_recommendations: KEEP SAMPLE_SIZE_CORRECTION for pitchers with fewer than 3 MLB starts.
KEEP LEASH_DEPENDENT_K_OVER logic for efficient starters with groundball/contact suppression runway.
ADD COMMAND_VOLATILITY_PENALTY for stake sizing and ladder decisions.
ADD CEILING_ERUPTION_EXCEPTION for elite starters whose CSW/whiff trend can break anti-burn fade logic.
Maintain WAIT_LIVE_BETTER tag as a no-pregame-fire filter rather than treating it as a full miss.
